subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is no God but Him, Who hath ever been sanctified beyond mention and utterance, and exalted above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان مقدسا عن الذکر و البیان و منزها عن
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @self-description of God; God's self-remembrance, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
